text.title: Methodology Contribution Flow (Open Authorship) Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Methodology Contribution Flow (Open Authorship) end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: submit
step.action: Contributor opens PR using `templates/PR-template.md` and links prior-art search.
step.output: Open PR with template fields populated.

step.name: triage
step.action: Maintainer triages: template complete? CLA signed? Tier matches?
step.decision-gate: If template incomplete or CLA missing, request changes and STOP.

step.name: three-axis-review
step.action: Three different maintainers review one axis each (shape, evidence, duplication) and post structured comments.
step.decision-gate: If any axis fails or has fewer than one explicit reviewer, request changes and STOP.

step.name: policy-finalise
step.action: Record attribution in maintainers + CHANGELOG; evaluate revenue-share trigger; set decay date.

step.name: register-and-merge
step.action: Validate record with `scripts/validate-methodology-contribution-flow-open-authorship.py`; update tier-manifest; squash-merge.
step.decision-gate: If validator returns non-zero, fix the record and re-run before merge.
